inputs.task: Resolve SAMPLE-001 architecture decisions for OIDC BFF, tenant authorization, document storage and scanning, PostgreSQL recovery, Kubernetes policy, Terraform state, GitLab runner trust, and frontend tooling

required_quality_gates.reason: Architecture is requirements-linked and defines boundaries, interfaces, flows, decisions, failure recovery, technology choices, and validation obligations.
Governance and data evidence defines controls, jurisdictions, accreditation, lineage, residency, non-egress, retention, derived outputs, enforcement, and applicability.
Security and cryptographic evidence covers threats, identities, dependencies, algorithms, keys, certificates, agility, downgrade analysis, mitigations, tests, and residual risk.
Independent verification binds requirement-linked tests, scans, defect dispositions, and acceptance evidence to the exact revision.
The immutable evidence index binds provenance, reviews, tests, decisions, exceptions, documentation, retention, classification, and defined BOMs.
Release readiness binds prior approvals, an immutable artifact, target compatibility, deployment and rollback plans, telemetry, capacity, support, thresholds, and window.

human_gates.reason: An authorized human must approve the exact destructive action and recovery plan.
